title: Learn and Plan at the Same Time

runtime.expected_outcome: Episode-over-episode A + B both concentrate while the agent still reaches the goal. Joint perception + learning + planning loop is stable.

symbols.learning: Dirichlet updates on A and B

audiences.kid: The agent learns from every try and plans better the next time.
audiences.real: Enable both learning hooks. Each episode updates A and B; the next episode plans against the updated model. This is the full Active Inference learning loop.
audiences.equation: For each episode: sweep beliefs -> Dirichlet updates -> replan with updated A, B. Three coupled loops.
audiences.derivation: Under mean-field factorisation over states, parameters, and policies, the three sub-loops can be alternated while monotonically decreasing total F (Parr et al. 2022, Ch 7 eq 7.10-7.14).

orchestrate.objective: Run the full inference + learning + planning loop across multiple episodes on a real maze.
orchestrate.context: forked_paths, learning_enabled=true, 5+ episodes. Log F, episode length, and A/B column norms.

credits: Parr, Pezzulo & Friston (2022), Active Inference, MIT Press (CC BY-NC-ND), Ch 7.
